text: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ عَنِ الْعَلَاءِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ مُسْلِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فِي رَجُلٍ رَهَنَ جَارِيَتَهُ قَوْماً أَ يَحِلُّ لَهُ أَنْ يَطَأَهَا قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنَّ الَّذِينَ ارْتَهَنُوهَا يَحُولُونَ بَيْنَهُ وَ بَيْنَهَا قُلْتُ أَ رَأَيْتَ إِنْ قَدَرَ عَلَيْهَا خَالِياً قَالَ نَعَمْ لَا أَرَى بِهِ بَأْساً .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Safwan, from Al A’ala, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> regarding a man who mortgaged his slave girl to a group of people, it is Permissible for him that he copulates with her?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Those who are holding her as a security deposit would hinder between him and her’. I said, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view if he was able upon that, alone’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, I<sup>asws</sup> do not see a problem with it’.
